overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Cyberpunk 2077 showing the player character walking through the Arasaka Corporation lobby, passing through security gates and approaching a large military mech on display. The scene features dark futuristic architecture with ambient lighting and geometric floor patterns.

scene_state.functional_zone: secure entrance corridor with metal detector gates

events.description: walking through the metal detector security gates

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the security checkpoint corridor toward the main lobby

entered.detail: tall metal detector gates with vertical bars blocking the corridor entrance
illuminated corporate logo mounted on the far wall beyond the gates
vertical strips of red LED lights running along the wall
vertical strips of red LED lights running along the wall
wall panels with diagonal wooden slats and warm lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a dark, enclosed security corridor with metal detector gates blocking the path. Red LED strips line the walls, and wooden slatted panels provide warm accent lighting. The camera moves forward steadily through the checkpoint toward the illuminated Arasaka logo visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate lobby with central mech display

events.description: exiting the narrow corridor into the wide open lobby space
the large military mech display becomes clearly visible in the center of the hall

agents.ego_description: walking across the expansive lobby floor toward the central mech display

notable_agents.action: standing still near the left wall observing the mech display

entered.detail: large black military mech with heavy armor and weapon systems on display
red velvet barrier ropes surrounding the mech display platform
stepped architectural backdrop behind the mech with the Arasaka logo
illuminated white lines forming geometric patterns on the dark polished floor

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a vast, dimly lit corporate lobby with a massive mech displayed in the center. The camera approaches the mech, passing red velvet ropes that cordon off the exhibit. The floor features glowing geometric patterns, and a tiered architectural structure rises behind the mech with the illuminated Arasaka logo. A lone NPC stands observing near the left wall.

scene_state.functional_zone: close-up viewing area around the mech display

events.description: beginning to circle around the mech display to the left
mech temporarily blocks view of the lobby background as camera passes close by

agents.ego_description: circling around the mech display to examine its armor and weapon details from the side

notable_agents.action: man in business suit standing with arms crossed observing the mech

entered.detail: horizontal illuminated light strips running along the far lobby wall

segments.scene_description: The camera begins circling the mech counter-clockwise, moving from a frontal view to a side profile. The massive scale of the mech becomes apparent as the camera passes the red velvet ropes. A man in a business suit stands nearby with arms crossed, observing the display. The background Arasaka logo becomes obscured by the mech's bulk as the camera moves alongside it.

scene_state.functional_zone: rear viewing area of the mech display

events.description: continuing to circle around to the rear side of the mech
additional NPCs become visible in the background near the far wall

agents.ego_description: completing the circuit around the mech, viewing its rear armor and weapon systems

notable_agents.action: group of people standing and conversing near the far wall

segments.scene_description: The camera continues circling to view the mech from behind and the opposite side, revealing the detailed rear armor and weapon mounting systems. The background opens up to show additional NPCs gathered near the far wall. Horizontal light strips line the distant walls, and the geometric floor patterns remain visible as the camera completes its circuit around the display.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a restrictive security checkpoint into a vast, dimly lit corporate lobby centered around a massive military exhibit. It begins by moving steadily through a dark, enclosed corridor lined with red LED strips and wooden panels, passing through metal detector gates toward a distant illuminated logo. As the camera emerges from the checkpoint, the space opens into a grand hall where the view expands to reveal a towering mech cordoned off by red velvet ropes atop a floor of glowing geometric patterns. The scene then shifts into a slow, counter-clockwise orbit around the machine, moving from a frontal view to a side profile that obscures the background logo and highlights a nearby observer in a business suit. Finally, the camera continues its circuit to reveal the detailed rear armor and weapon systems of the mech before opening up to show other NPCs gathered against the far walls under horizontal light strips.
